name: mhcet
description: MHCET Law Mock — API + Next.js. From repo root: npm install && npm run dev

scripts.dev: npm run dev:ports && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "cross-env WATCHPACK_POLLING=1 npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:web: cross-env WATCHPACK_POLLING=1 npm run dev --prefix frontend
